xml.sax.saxutils/prepare_input_source.name: prepare_input_source
xml.sax.saxutils/prepare_input_source.description: This function takes an input source and an optional base URL and returns a fully resolved InputSource object ready for reading. The input source can be given as a string, a file-like object, or an InputSource object; parsers will use this function to implement the polymorphic source argument to their parse() method.
